title: fix(desktop): give Provider-type segmented control valid tab roles
finding_fixed: Original PR added role=tab and aria-selected, but left the tablist without tabpanel ownership and keyboard navigation. Repair adds aria-controls, role=tabpanel, roving tabIndex, and Arrow/Home/End navigation.

rendered_proof.flow: http://127.0.0.1:4270/#settings -> Model providers -> Provider type Local/Cloud tabs
rendered_proof.browser_fallback_reason: Browser plugin bootstrap succeeded but agent.browsers.get("iab") returned: Browser is not available: iab

verification_summary.staging: /Applications/otto-staging.app refreshed with isolated HOME and OTTO_HOME

known_gaps: In-app Browser endpoint iab was unavailable, so screenshots/data used Playwright fallback.
